name: IdsEdwHedisMesrGapDplyDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH SOURCE_DATA AS (SELECT t.HEDIS_MESR_GAP_DPLY_SK, t.HEDIS_MESR_NM, t.HEDIS_SUB_MESR_NM, t.HEDIS_MBR_BUCKET_ID, t.MOD_ID, t.HEDIS_MESR_GAP_DPLY_MOD_EFF_DT, t.SRC_SYS_CD, t.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK as IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, t.HEDIS_MESR_GAP_SK, t.HEDIS_MESR_GAP_DPLY_MOD_TERM_DT, t.HEDIS_MESR_GAP_MOD_PRTY_NO, t.HEDIS_MESR_ABBR_ID, t.HEDIS_MESR_GAP_MOD_CAT_ID, t.HEDIS_MESR_MOD_KEY_ID, t.HEDIS_MESR_GAP_MOD_DPLY_TX, t.HEDIS_MESR_GAP_MOD_SCRIPT_TX FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.HEDIS_MESR_GAP_DPLY t ) SELECT HEDIS_MESR_GAP_DPLY_SK, HEDIS_MESR_NM, HEDIS_SUB_MESR_NM, HEDIS_MBR_BUCKET_ID, MOD_ID, HEDIS_MESR_GAP_DPLY_MOD_EFF_DT, SRC_SYS_CD, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' as CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' as LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, HEDIS_MESR_GAP_SK, HEDIS_MESR_GAP_DPLY_MOD_TERM_DT, HEDIS_MESR_GAP_MOD_PRTY_NO, HEDIS_MESR_ABBR_ID, HEDIS_MESR_GAP_MOD_CAT_ID, HEDIS_MESR_MOD_KEY_ID, HEDIS_MESR_GAP_MOD_DPLY_TX, HEDIS_MESR_GAP_MOD_SCRIPT_TX, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} as CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} as LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM SOURCE_DATA
